nearest_neighbor_traps.name: nearest_neighbor_trap
nearest_neighbor_traps.description: Clustered cities with deceptive bridge connections that trap greedy algorithms
nearest_neighbor_traps.expected_weakness: Nearest neighbor will jump to bridge city too early, creating long detours

symmetric_tsp_traps.name: triangle_inequality_violation
symmetric_tsp_traps.description: Cities arranged to violate triangle inequality + needle distribution
symmetric_tsp_traps.expected_weakness: Algorithms assuming metric TSP will produce suboptimal tours

euclidean_hard_cases.name: euclidean_mixed_hard
euclidean_hard_cases.description: Mixed circle + grid arrangement testing symmetry handling and equal-distance choices
euclidean_hard_cases.expected_weakness: Algorithms may struggle with symmetry breaking and tie-breaking

large_scale.name: large_scale_power_law
large_scale.description: Large-scale (500 cities) with power-law cluster distribution
large_scale.expected_weakness: Scalability issues, memory blowup, timeout on naive implementations

edge_cases.name: edge_cases
edge_cases.description: Collection of small and degenerate cases
edge_cases.expected_weakness: Division by zero, index errors, incorrect handling of small n
